summary: Recording suffers from flat, dull high end with no noted musical highlights
review: The sole review points out that the transfer sounds flat and lacks the crispness expected from Schoeps microphones, suggesting a problem either with the source or the conversion software. No comments were made about the band's performance, leaving the musical quality unaddressed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one low‑star review focusing on poor audio fidelity; no positive show information to offset the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Flat, dull high frequencies; lack of crispness; possible transfer software issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No performance details provided in the review.
